bugs.description: Title truncated mid-word with ellipsis: spec ends '...across all supported presets and palettes' but render shows only '...clip outer m...' on line 4.
bugs.evidence: Line 4 of title at y~330 ends with 'clip outer m...' — title text after that is dropped.

bugs.description: Subtitle truncated with ellipsis: ends 'with com...' instead of full sentence configured in spec.
bugs.evidence: Subtitle third line ends 'with com...' near the right margin.

bugs.description: Rotated value labels (e.g. '98.1', '52.6', '8.2') are drawn vertically inside narrow bars and visually collide with the bar tops; the '8.2' label sits on the bar top edge.
bugs.evidence: Group 6 Revenue 2 bar at value 8.2 — value label rotated and overlapping bar boundary.

bugs.description: Source line truncated with ellipsis: 'OECD · IMF · World Bank composite, author calculat...' — last word cut.
bugs.evidence: Footer source text trails with '...' near the aicharts logo.

bugs.description: Subtitle truncated with ellipsis: ends 'commas, semicolons; an...' instead of full configured text.
bugs.evidence: Subtitle line 4 ends with 'an...' at right margin.

bugs.description: Multiple truncations: subtitle ends 'with com...', source ends 'calculat...', AND every legend label is clipped to first 4-5 chars ('Tren...', 'Growt...', 'Inde...', 'Inflat...', 'Mean...'). Legend labels are unreadable.
bugs.evidence: Right-side legend at center-right of donut: each row shows truncated label with ellipsis instead of full 'Trend 13', 'Growth 1', etc.

bugs.description: Legend labels truncated to 'Tren...', 'Growt...', 'Inde...' make the chart unreadable — viewer cannot identify any slice.
bugs.evidence: All 6 visible legend rows show ellipsis on labels that should fit ('Trend 13' is only 8 characters).

bugs.description: Subtitle truncated with ellipsis: ends 'one very long sent...' instead of full configured text.
bugs.evidence: Subtitle line 3 ends 'sent...' near right margin.

bugs.description: Asia basemap rendered tiny in the middle of a large empty canvas — map occupies less than ~20% of the available plot area, leaving huge dead space all around. Most of the country shapes are unreadable thumbnails.
bugs.evidence: Map polygons appear as a small cluster in the middle of the chart area; the visible plot is dominated by dark-blue background, not the map.

bugs.description: Subtitle ends 'commas, semicolons; an...' truncated; source ends 'methodology revi...' truncated.
bugs.evidence: Subtitle final line and source line both terminate with '...' before the configured content ends.

bugs.description: Choropleth is so small that data values cannot be visually associated with countries; the diverging legend reads '136 to 544' but no country is large enough to read.
bugs.evidence: Map cluster centered around y~180 is roughly 120px wide on a ~470px-wide canvas with substantial empty area above and below.
